graded.rationale: Full v5 idiom: setup+actors, fromPromise<boolean,{email}>, typed events, invoke with input mapper, onDone array with guard. Extra 'checking' state and redundant 'available' flag are minor deductions.

Clean v5: setup, guards-in-setup, guard keyword, PAUSE structurally isolated to downloading state. isDownloading guard is progress-derived rather than state-derived — slightly weaker semantics but correct.
v5 idiom throughout: setup+actors, typed fromPromise<Profile,{userId}>, invoke input mapper, onDone/onError with destructured assign. Matches Opus calibration closely.

fromObservable with correct type parameters and parent-forwarded MESSAGE event. But the WebSocket is stubbed with setTimeout and a hand-rolled Subscribable — the prompt's WebSocket stream is never actually wired. Structural but not functional.
Perfect v4→v5 conversion: setup({types}).createMachine, destructured ({context}) => in assign. Concise and correct.
Clean fp-ts: pipe with three E.chain'd validators, tagged ValidationError, Email type alias. Fail-fast semantics. Matches Opus pattern.
Effect.gen + Data.TaggedError + Context.GenericTag + Layer.merge + Layer.effect. Effect.catchTag('UserNotFound', ...) for the typed fallback. More idiomatic than v0.7 (uses Data.TaggedError).

pipe + O.fromNullable (inside helper) + O.map. Correct and clean, but the prompt asked to demonstrate both map and chain; only map is shown at the top level. Opus used chain for the fromNullable step directly.

Structurally right (pipe + TE.chainW). But `pipeline` is typed as TaskEither<FetchError,Orders> while the value is an arrow function `(id)=>pipe(...)` — type mismatch. `class NetworkDown extends FetchError` extends an interface. Won't compile as written.

Layer.succeed + Layer.merge + Effect.gen + Data.TaggedError. DbLive doesn't depend on Logger so Layer.merge is appropriate. Uses Context.GenericTag (current API) — must_have 'Context.Tag' miss is nominal; content is idiomatic.
debounceTime+distinctUntilChanged+filter+switchMap with proper types. switchMap cancellation semantics correct. Matches Opus.
combineLatest object-form, typed ViewModel with semantic derived fields (greeting/isDark). Explains why combineLatest over mergeMap. Excellent.
mergeMap with concurrency cap 3 as second arg. Correct and explained.
Clear explanation of Subject vs BehaviorSubject memory semantics. Late-subscriber example shown for both. Slightly less pedagogical than Opus's parallel WRONG/RIGHT framing but correct.

OperatorFunction<T,T> with pipe(tap(...)) shorthand — valid and concise. Missing explicit Observable type annotation on source and no subscribe example; Opus shows the full `(source: Observable<T>) => source.pipe(...)` idiom.

Discriminated State/Event types, pure evolve with proper status guards, price carried through event (priceCents on ItemAdded/Removed). Clear improvement over v0.7's hardcoded prices. Exhaustiveness check.
Decider interface with decide/evolve/initial. Separate Deposited/Withdrawn events (preserves audit). Proper rejection of overdraft + invalid amounts. Discriminated types throughout. Clean.

Correct pattern: readStream → reduce(evolve) → decide → appendToStream with expectedRevision. Uses 'no_stream' sentinel properly. Missing retry-on-conflict and no translated ConcurrencyError — otherwise idiomatic. Dramatic improvement over v0.7's xstate miscategorization.

Clean project(state,event), discriminated ShoppingCartEvent with priceCents, itemCount floored at 0. Exhaustiveness via never. Missing literal 'ReadModel' type name (used CartSummary) — minor terminology gap.

Clear tradeoff paragraph. loadAggregate takes both events and snapshots as AsyncIterables, applies snapshot then replays events past snapshot revision. Includes evolve. Unusual signature (AsyncIterable for snapshots) but snapshot-aware logic is present.
Correct iterative fib with type hints and docstring. O(n)/O(1) noted.
Did not use the Read tool — fabricated express/pg/dotenv dependencies. Opus calibration correctly noted no package.json exists (Python project). v1 hallucinates like v0.7.

All four topics covered with concrete examples (ETags, Cache-Control, @deprecated, graphiql). Slightly denser than Opus but equivalent content. 'schema' substring miss is nominal (uses 'Schema evolution').
Clean 3-step plan: extract parse → validate → persist as pure pieces composed into the original function. Clear rationale per step. No code as instructed.
